candidates.why: A separate operating depreciation line exists, but it is not labelled as COGS/cost of sales and does not appear nested under the selected COGS row 'Materials and services'. Conservatively avoid adding it to COGS to prevent misclassification/double counting.
Although it is a D&A-like label, it appears after the interest income line, so it falls outside the operating section for this task and should be ignored.

variables.notes: No explicit COGS-specific D&A row is visible above the financial section. The separate depreciation line appears to be a general operating expense line rather than part of the selected COGS bucket.

candidates.why: This is a separate operating depreciation line shown alongside other operating expense lines and outside the selected XSGA component rows. Since the selected XSGA bucket was built from components and no SG&A total was chosen, this separate depreciation line appears to sit outside that bucket and should be added separately.
It appears after the interest income line, so it is outside the relevant pre-financial operating scope and should not be selected for this task.

variables.notes: The broader row 'Depreciation, amortisation and impairment charges' is not selected because it includes impairment, which is out of scope, and because a cleaner D&A component row exists above the financial section.
